headline: Cisco Quantum Switch Puts Interoperability And Valuation In Investor Focus
summary: Cisco Systems (NasdaqGS:CSCO) has introduced a Universal Quantum Switch for quantum networking interoperability. The prototype is designed to route quantum information between different systems and modalities. The switch is intended to connect quantum devices from multiple vendors while using standard telecom infrastructure. Cisco sits at the center of global networking equipment, and this Universal Quantum Switch adds a new dimension to its portfolio beyond AI and cybersecurity. Quantum...

headline: South East Asia Building Management System (BMS) Industry Report 2026-2034: Surge in Demand for Energy Efficiency, Sustainability Initiatives, and Intelligent Facility Management Drives Expansion
summary: The South East Asia Building Management System (BMS) market is set for significant growth due to rapid urbanization, smart technology adoption, and sustainability initiatives. The market is projected to expand from US$ 6.51 billion in 2025 to US$ 17.64 billion by 2034, at a CAGR of 11.71%. Key growth drivers include urban infrastructure development, energy efficiency demands, and smart city initiatives. Challenges include high initial investments and limited technical expertise.
